channel.title: Nail Art Ideas from vivarecipesinspo.github.io/nails
channel.description: A collection of stunning nail art ideas and inspiration.

item.title: Gorgeous Nails Design Short Coffin
item.description: Can't get enough of the glam? Add some serious sparkle to your life with this Nails Design Short Coffin masterpiece. Head over to our channel for the product breakdown. #glamnails #sparkleandshine #nailmasterpiece #luxurylook #instanails
